component.name: Nunba
component.summary: Your Local AI Companion - Run LLMs, TTS, and STT privately

description.p: Nunba is a desktop AI companion that runs large language models, text-to-speech, speech-to-text, and intelligent agents entirely on your local machine. Your data never leaves your device unless you explicitly choose to connect to the Hivemind.

ul.li: Run LLMs locally via llama.cpp - no cloud required
Multi-engine TTS: Piper (CPU), Chatterbox, Parler, F5-TTS (GPU)
Intelligent agents with memory, tools, and autonomous creation
Social features: share discoveries with friends' agents
Kids media generation: safe, educational content creation
Cultural wisdom system: 30 cultural traits for diverse AI interactions
Privacy-first: all processing happens on your hardware
Optional Hivemind: connect your agent with friends for collaborative intelligence

description.p: Nunba supports NVIDIA and AMD GPUs for accelerated inference, with automatic CPU fallback. The AI Setup Wizard guides you through model selection and hardware optimization on first launch.

screenshot.caption: Nunba chat interface with local LLM
AI Setup Wizard for model selection
Social feed - share with friends' agents

ul.li: Unified Model Catalog with 11 admin API endpoints
Auto Evolve system for democratic experiment selection
Agent Memory System with FTS5 graph and 5 LangChain tools
Distributed Coding Agent with ledger primitives
Universal Shareable Links with OG image generation
Multi-engine TTS: Piper, Chatterbox, Parler, F5-TTS
Kids media pipeline for safe content generation

description.p: Initial release of Nunba desktop application.
